mapper.select:
SELECT (COUNT(*) * 1.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review_basic_info where type = #{req.group})) AS data_ratio, COUNT(CASE WHEN rbi.gender = '男' THEN 1 END) AS male_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN rbi.gender = '女' THEN 1 END) AS female_count, -- Age metrics AVG(rboi.age) AS average_age, MIN(rboi.age) AS min_age, MAX(rboi.age) AS max_age,
-- Highland service metrics AVG(service_info.altitude) AS average_highland_altitude, MAX(service_info.altitude) AS max_highland_altitude, MIN(service_info.altitude) AS min_highland_altitude, AVG((service_info.year1 + service_info.year2 + service_info.year3 + service_info.year4 + service_info.year5 - service_info.year6) * 12 + (service_info.month1 + service_info.month2 + service_info.month3 + service_info.month4 + service_info.month5 + service_info.month6 )) AS average_highland_service_duration, MAX((service_info.year1 + service_info.year2 + service_info.year3 + service_info.year4 + service_info.year5 - service_info.year6) * 12 + (service_info.month1 + service_info.month2 + service_info.month3 + service_info.month4 + service_info.month5 + service_info.month6 )) AS max_highland_service_duration, MIN((service_info.year1 + service_info.year2 + service_info.year3 + service_info.year4 + service_info.year5 - service_info.year6) * 12 + (service_info.month1 + service_info.month2 + service_info.month3 + service_info.month4 + service_info.month5 + service_info.month6 )) AS min_highland_service_duration,
-- Post-retirement Chengdu living metrics AVG(post_return_info.chengdu_residence_time) AS average_chengdu_living_duration, MAX(post_return_info.chengdu_residence_time) AS max_chengdu_living_duration, MIN(post_return_info.chengdu_residence_time) AS min_chengdu_living_duration, AVG(rcs_residence_info.residence1) AS average_chengdu_living_duration, MAX(rcs_residence_info.residence1) AS max_chengdu_living_duration, MIN(rcs_residence_info.residence1) AS min_chengdu_living_duration,
AVG(2023 - service_info.discharge_year) AS average_years_since_discharge, MAX(2023 - service_info.discharge_year) AS max_years_since_discharge, MIN(2023 - service_info.discharge_year) AS min_years_since_discharge,
AVG(ree_biochemical_tests.total_cholesterol) AS ree_average_total_cholesterol, AVG(ree_biochemical_tests.triglycerides) AS ree_average_triglycerides, AVG(ree_biochemical_tests.hdl_c) AS ree_average_hdl_c, AVG(ree_biochemical_tests.ldl_c) AS ree_average_ldl_c, AVG(ree_biochemical_tests.total_protein) AS ree_average_total_protein, AVG(ree_biochemical_tests.albumin) AS ree_average_albumin, AVG(ree_biochemical_tests.globulin) AS ree_average_globulin, AVG(ree_biochemical_tests.alb_glob_ratio) AS ree_average_alb_glob_ratio, AVG(ree_biochemical_tests.total_bilirubin) AS ree_average_total_bilirubin, AVG(ree_biochemical_tests.direct_bilirubin) AS ree_average_direct_bilirubin, AVG(ree_biochemical_tests.indirect_bilirubin) AS ree_average_indirect_bilirubin, AVG(ree_biochemical_tests.alt) AS ree_average_alt, AVG(ree_biochemical_tests.ast) AS ree_average_ast, AVG(ree_biochemical_tests.uric_acid) AS ree_average_uric_acid, AVG(ree_biochemical_tests.urea) AS ree_average_urea, AVG(ree_biochemical_tests.creatinine) AS ree_average_creatinine, AVG(ree_biochemical_tests.prothrombin_time) AS ree_average_prothrombin_time, AVG(ree_biochemical_tests.prothrombin_activity) AS ree_average_prothrombin_activity, AVG(ree_biochemical_tests.inr) AS ree_average_inr, AVG(ree_biochemical_tests.fibrinogen) AS ree_average_fibrinogen, AVG(ree_biochemical_tests.aptt) AS ree_average_aptt, AVG(ree_biochemical_tests.thrombin_time) AS ree_average_thrombin_time,
AVG(rce_biochemical_tests.total_cholesterol) AS rce_average_total_cholesterol, AVG(rce_biochemical_tests.triglycerides) AS rce_average_triglycerides, AVG(rce_biochemical_tests.hdl_c) AS rce_average_hdl_c, AVG(rce_biochemical_tests.ldl_c) AS rce_average_ldl_c, AVG(rce_biochemical_tests.total_protein) AS rce_average_total_protein, AVG(rce_biochemical_tests.albumin) AS rce_average_albumin, AVG(rce_biochemical_tests.globulin) AS rce_average_globulin, AVG(rce_biochemical_tests.alb_glob_ratio) AS rce_average_alb_glob_ratio, AVG(rce_biochemical_tests.total_bilirubin) AS rce_average_total_bilirubin, AVG(rce_biochemical_tests.direct_bilirubin) AS rce_average_direct_bilirubin, AVG(rce_biochemical_tests.indirect_bilirubin) AS rce_average_indirect_bilirubin, AVG(rce_biochemical_tests.alt) AS rce_average_alt, AVG(rce_biochemical_tests.ast) AS rce_average_ast, AVG(rce_biochemical_tests.uric_acid) AS rce_average_uric_acid, AVG(rce_biochemical_tests.urea) AS rce_average_urea, AVG(rce_biochemical_tests.creatinine) AS rce_average_creatinine, AVG(rce_biochemical_tests.prothrombin_time) AS rce_average_prothrombin_time, AVG(rce_biochemical_tests.prothrombin_activity) AS rce_average_prothrombin_activity, AVG(rce_biochemical_tests.inr) AS rce_average_inr, AVG(rce_biochemical_tests.fibrinogen) AS rce_average_fibrinogen, AVG(rce_biochemical_tests.aptt) AS rce_average_aptt, AVG(rce_biochemical_tests.thrombin_time) AS rce_average_thrombin_time,
AVG(ree_blood_routine.wbc) AS ree_average_wbc, AVG(ree_blood_routine.rbc) AS ree_average_rbc, AVG(ree_blood_routine.neutrophils) AS ree_average_neutrophils, AVG(ree_blood_routine.lymphocytes) AS ree_average_lymphocytes, AVG(ree_blood_routine.monocytes) AS ree_average_monocytes, AVG(ree_blood_routine.eosinophils) AS ree_average_eosinophils, AVG(ree_blood_routine.basophils) AS ree_average_basophils, AVG(ree_blood_routine.mcv) AS ree_average_mcv, AVG(ree_blood_routine.mch) AS ree_average_mch, AVG(ree_blood_routine.mchc) AS ree_average_mchc, AVG(ree_blood_routine.rdw_cv) AS ree_average_rdw_cv, AVG(ree_blood_routine.rdw_sd) AS ree_average_rdw_sd, AVG(ree_blood_routine.hemoglobin) AS ree_average_hemoglobin, AVG(ree_blood_routine.platelet_crit) AS ree_average_platelet_crit, AVG(ree_blood_routine.mpv) AS ree_average_mpv, AVG(ree_blood_routine.pdw) AS ree_average_pdw, AVG(ree_blood_routine.hematocrit) AS ree_average_hematocrit, AVG(ree_blood_routine.platelet_count) AS ree_average_platelet_count, AVG(ree_blood_routine.neutrophils_percentage) AS ree_average_neutrophils_percentage, AVG(ree_blood_routine.lymphocytes_percentage) AS ree_average_lymphocytes_percentage, AVG(ree_blood_routine.monocytes_percentage) AS ree_average_monocytes_percentage, AVG(ree_blood_routine.eosinophils_percentage) AS ree_average_eosinophils_percentage, AVG(ree_blood_routine.basophils_percentage) AS ree_average_basophils_percentage,
AVG(rce_blood_routine.wbc) AS rce_average_wbc, AVG(rce_blood_routine.rbc) AS rce_average_rbc, AVG(rce_blood_routine.neutrophils) AS rce_average_neutrophils, AVG(rce_blood_routine.lymphocytes) AS rce_average_lymphocytes, AVG(rce_blood_routine.monocytes) AS rce_average_monocytes, AVG(rce_blood_routine.eosinophils) AS rce_average_eosinophils, AVG(rce_blood_routine.basophils) AS rce_average_basophils, AVG(rce_blood_routine.mcv) AS rce_average_mcv, AVG(rce_blood_routine.mch) AS rce_average_mch, AVG(rce_blood_routine.mchc) AS rce_average_mchc, AVG(rce_blood_routine.rdw_cv) AS rce_average_rdw_cv, AVG(rce_blood_routine.rdw_sd) AS rce_average_rdw_sd, AVG(rce_blood_routine.hemoglobin) AS rce_average_hemoglobin, AVG(rce_blood_routine.platelet_crit) AS rce_average_platelet_crit, AVG(rce_blood_routine.mpv) AS rce_average_mpv, AVG(rce_blood_routine.pdw) AS rce_average_pdw, AVG(rce_blood_routine.hematocrit) AS rce_average_hematocrit, AVG(rce_blood_routine.platelet_count) AS rce_average_platelet_count, AVG(rce_blood_routine.neutrophils_percentage) AS rce_average_neutrophils_percentage, AVG(rce_blood_routine.lymphocytes_percentage) AS rce_average_lymphocytes_percentage, AVG(rce_blood_routine.monocytes_percentage) AS rce_average_monocytes_percentage, AVG(rce_blood_routine.eosinophils_percentage) AS rce_average_eosinophils_percentage, AVG(rce_blood_routine.basophils_percentage) AS rce_average_basophils_percentage FROM review_basic_info rbi LEFT JOIN review_basic_other_info rboi ON rboi.person_id = rbi.id LEFT JOIN review_experiment_survey_diet diet ON diet.person_id = rbi.id LEFT JOIN review_experiment_survey_drinking drinking ON drinking.person_id = rbi.id LEFT JOIN review_experiment_survey_exercise exercise ON exercise.person_id = rbi.id LEFT JOIN review_experiment_survey_family_diseases family_diseases ON family_diseases.person_id = rbi.id LEFT JOIN review_experiment_survey_highland_diseases highland_diseases ON highland_diseases.person_id = rbi.id LEFT JOIN review_experiment_survey_highland_diseases_during_service highland_diseases_during_service ON highland_diseases_during_service.person_id = rbi.id LEFT JOIN review_experiment_survey_highland_reaction highland_reaction ON highland_reaction.person_id = rbi.id LEFT JOIN review_experiment_survey_highland_reaction_symptoms highland_reaction_symptoms ON highland_reaction_symptoms.person_id = rbi.id LEFT JOIN review_experiment_survey_new_diseases new_diseases ON new_diseases.person_id = rbi.id LEFT JOIN review_experiment_survey_new_diseases_post_return new_diseases_post_return ON new_diseases_post_return.person_id = rbi.id LEFT JOIN review_experiment_survey_post_return_info post_return_info ON post_return_info.person_id = rbi.id LEFT JOIN review_experiment_survey_post_return_symptoms post_return_symptoms ON post_return_symptoms.person_id = rbi.id LEFT JOIN review_experiment_survey_self_assessment self_assessment ON self_assessment.person_id = rbi.id LEFT JOIN review_experiment_survey_service_info service_info ON service_info.person_id = rbi.id LEFT JOIN review_experiment_survey_sleep sleep ON sleep.person_id = rbi.id LEFT JOIN review_experiment_survey_smoking smoking ON smoking.person_id = rbi.id LEFT JOIN review_experiment_exam_abdominal_ultrasound ree_abdominal_ultrasound ON ree_abdominal_ultrasound.person_id = rbi.id LEFT JOIN review_experiment_exam_basic_tests ree_basic_tests ON ree_basic_tests.person_id = rbi.id LEFT JOIN review_experiment_exam_biochemical_tests ree_biochemical_tests ON ree_biochemical_tests.person_id = rbi.id LEFT JOIN review_experiment_exam_blood_routine ree_blood_routine ON ree_blood_routine.person_id = rbi.id LEFT JOIN review_experiment_exam_ecg ree_ecg ON ree_ecg.person_id = rbi.id LEFT JOIN review_experiment_exam_past_medical_history ree_past_medical_history ON ree_past_medical_history.person_id = rbi.id LEFT JOIN review_control_exam_abdominal_ultrasound rce_abdominal_ultrasound ON rce_abdominal_ultrasound.person_id = rbi.id LEFT JOIN review_control_exam_basic_tests rce_basic_tests ON rce_basic_tests.person_id = rbi.id LEFT JOIN review_control_exam_biochemical_tests rce_biochemical_tests ON rce_biochemical_tests.person_id = rbi.id LEFT JOIN review_control_exam_blood_routine rce_blood_routine ON rce_blood_routine.person_id = rbi.id LEFT JOIN review_control_exam_ecg rce_ecg ON rce_ecg.person_id = rbi.id LEFT JOIN review_control_exam_past_medical_history rce_past_medical_history ON rce_past_medical_history.person_id = rbi.id LEFT JOIN review_control_survey_drinking_info rcs_drinking_info ON rcs_drinking_info.person_id = rbi.id LEFT JOIN review_control_survey_past_diseases rcs_past_diseases ON rcs_past_diseases.person_id = rbi.id LEFT JOIN review_control_survey_residence_info rcs_residence_info ON rcs_residence_info.person_id = rbi.id LEFT JOIN review_control_survey_self_assessment rcs_self_assessment ON rcs_self_assessment.person_id = rbi.id LEFT JOIN review_control_survey_smoking_info rcs_smoking_info ON rcs_smoking_info.person_id = rbi.id LEFT JOIN review_experiment_disease_spectrum experiment_disease_spectrum ON experiment_disease_spectrum.person_id = rbi.id LEFT JOIN review_control_disease_spectrum control_disease_spectrum ON control_disease_spectrum.person_id = rbi.id LEFT JOIN review_experiment_framingham experiment_framingham ON experiment_framingham.person_id = rbi.id LEFT JOIN review_control_framingham control_framingham ON control_framingham.person_id = rbi.id
rbi.type = #{req.group}
NOT (${cond.field} ${cond.operator}
CONCAT('%', #{cond.value}, '%'))
#{cond.value})
${cond.logic} ${cond.field} ${cond.operator}
CONCAT('%', #{cond.value}, '%')
#{cond.value}
